display_text: Kobold Cup, Tier 1: Neutral item providing One for the Road active (40 Mana cost). Increases movement speed of all allied units in a 1000 radius by 10% for 6 seconds. Provides a short-duration teamwide mobility buff, useful for initiating retreats or chases. Stats: CD: 40s, Mana: 40, Duration: 6s, Radius: 1000.
